# PDF.js vendor assets

These files are self-hosted so the file preview page works with the production Content Security Policy (`script-src 'self'`) without allowing third-party script CDNs.

Version: PDF.js 3.11.174
Source: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/

Files:

- `pdf.min.js`
  - Source URL: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.min.js
  - SHA-256: `5b5799e6f8c680663207ac5b42ee14eed2a406fa7af48f50c154f0c0b1566946`
- `pdf.worker.min.js`
  - Source URL: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.worker.min.js
  - SHA-256: `feabdf309770ed24bba31a5467836cdc8cf639c705af27d52b585b041bb8527b`
